ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Name of the institution the student is affiliated with */,
  "academic_status" TEXT /* Current academic status of the student (e.g., Student, Graduate) */,
  "main_discipline" TEXT /* Main area of study or discipline */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Detailed description of the student's research interests */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the student */,
  "advisors" TEXT /* Names and IDs of the student's advisors */,
  "date_of_enrollment" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the program */,
  "expected_graduation_date" TEXT /* Expected graduation date of the student */,
  "current_status" TEXT /* Current status of the student (e.g., Active, On Leave, Graduated) */,
  "research_project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project the student is involved in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "project_title" TEXT /* Title of the research project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the research project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Expected or actual end date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., Ongoing, Completed, On Hold) */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Allocated budget for the project */,
  "funding_sources" TEXT /* Sources of funding for the project */,
  "milestones" TEXT /* Key milestones and their completion status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advisors" (
  "advisor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advisor */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the advisor */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the advisor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email of the advisor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the advisor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("advisor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_milestones" (
  "milestone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each milestone */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project the milestone is associated with */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the milestone */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the milestone */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Actual completion date of the milestone */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the milestone (e.g., Not Started, In Progress, Completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("milestone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student the notification is sent to */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project the notification is related to */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., Unread, Read) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id")
)
